name: Fiesta Ranch Potatoes with Creamy Chile Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 Hidden Valley Ranch Fiesta dressing packet
5 medium baking potatoes, cut lengthwise into eights
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2 Place potatoes on a greased baking sheet.
3 Sprinkle dip mix over the potatoes.
4 Drizzle with vegetable oil.
5 Bake for 45-50 minutes or until tender, turning halfway through.
